headline: Is Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NCLH) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is NCLH a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. on VJS Newsletter’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on NCLH. Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd.’s share was trading at $17.20 as of May 4th. NCLH’s trailing and forward P/E were 20.45 and 7.77 […]
